title: Pesarattu with Tomato Chutney
description: Crisp Andhra-style whole-moong crepes with quick tomato chutney for a gluten-free breakfast or brunch.
explanation: Soaking and blending whole green moong makes a naturally protein-rich batter without flour. The chutney stays simple and no-onion/no-garlic by default.
ingredients: 1 cup Whole Green Moong, soaked overnight
instructions: Drain soaked moong and blend with cumin, turmeric, salt, chilli, and enough water for a pourable batter.
Spread a ladle of batter thinly on a hot lightly oiled tawa. Cook both sides until crisp; repeat.
For chutney, cook tomatoes with salt until soft, then blend or mash smooth.
Temper the chutney with mustard seeds and curry leaves in the remaining oil.
Serve pesarattu hot with tomato chutney.
